sections.description: Native SEO control layer for the RankRocket remediation pipeline. Manages title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, cache purge, and self-updates.
sections.changelog:
v2.5.0: WordPress admin panel (Overview, Posts & Pages, Image ALT, Snippets, llms.txt, Sitemap) + read-only Edit Post/Page sidebar meta box showing SEO fields and audit log.
v2.4.1: Fix document title override — pre_get_document_title timing bug.
v2.4.0: POST /migrate-legacy endpoint; PHPUnit/phpcs testing stack.
v2.3.1: replace-all guarded by custom capability.
